creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
I am also able to reproduce the OPTIONS issue you described at https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/600.

With 'DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=emacs=nox' in /etc/make.conf

cd /usr/ports/devel/magit
make rmconfig-recursive
make -VFLAVOR
nox
make config-recursive [1]
make rmconfig-recursive
make FLAVOR=nox config-recursive [2]

[1] brings up options dialog for magit-emacs25_nox, and options dialog for emasc-25 and dependencies (incorrect)

[2] brings up options dialog for magit-emacs25_nox, and options dialog for emasc-nox-25 and dependencies (correct)
